hero.subtext: Expert physiotherapy — from your home, your office, or anywhere you are. No commute. No waiting room. Real results.

servicesSection.label: Our Specialities
servicesSection.title: One Platform.
servicesSection.subtitle: Whether you're recovering from surgery or managing a chronic condition, our certified physios are here for you.

services.title: Orthopaedic
services.description: Joints, spine, post-surgery recovery and musculoskeletal conditions treated with evidence-based protocols.

services.title: Sports Rehab
services.description: Injury recovery and athlete conditioning programs designed by sports physio specialists.

services.title: Neuro Rehab
services.description: Stroke, Parkinson's, balance disorders — expert neurological rehabilitation from home.

services.title: Cardio Physio
services.description: Post-bypass, breathing rehabilitation, and endurance training for a stronger heart and lungs.

services.title: Chronic Care
services.description: Arthritis, fibromyalgia, long-term pain management — sustained relief through personalized therapy.

services.title: Fitness for All
services.description: Teens to seniors — safe, structured fitness programs to improve strength, mobility and quality of life.
